case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. HECTOR HUMBERTO CABRERA MORENO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CABRERA MORENO, HECTOR HUMBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT HECTOR HUMBERTO CABRERA MORENO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A DISMISSAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
